heading: Organization
label: 7011 Organization
text: The Department of the Army is separately organized under the Secretary of the Army. It operates under the authority, direction, and control of the Secretary of Defense.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30105:171a(c)(7) (1st sentence, as applicable to Department of Army).(1st sentence, as applicable, to Department of Army); added , (1st sentence of 8th par., as applicable to Department of Army), .July 26, 1947, ch. 343, § 202(c)(7)Pub. L. 85–599, § 3(a)72 Stat. 516Aug. 6, 1958The word “operates” is substituted for the words “shall function”.
